# Repository Description & Metadata

This file contains metadata for GitHub repository settings.

## Short Description

Enterprise-grade Telegram affiliate bot with multi-level commission tracking, real-time analytics, and AI-enhanced development workflow.

## Full Description

A production-ready Telegram affiliate marketing platform built with modern TypeScript, featuring:

- Multi-level agent system with tiered commissions (Agent, Silver, Gold, Platinum)
- Event-driven commission tracking (new_user, deposit, first_deposit, withdrawal)
- Real-time analytics dashboard with Vue 3 + Tailwind
- Cloudflare Workers edge deployment (<100ms latency)
- Bun-first development with native APIs
- 6 comprehensive Cursor AI rules for consistent development
- TurboRepo monorepo with shared packages
- Full test coverage (Vitest + Playwright)
- Structured documentation (28.8KB rules + guides)

Perfect for learning modern full-stack TypeScript development or building your own affiliate system!

## Repository Settings Recommendations

### General
- ✅ Enable Issues
- ✅ Enable Projects (for roadmap)
- ✅ Enable Wiki (or use docs/ instead)
- ✅ Enable Discussions (for community)
- ✅ Preserve this repository (if critical)

### Features
- ✅ Wikis: Disabled (using docs/ directory)
- ✅ Issues: Enabled
- ✅ Sponsorships: Optional
- ✅ Projects: Enabled
- ✅ Discussions: Enabled

### Pull Requests
- ✅ Allow squash merging
- ✅ Allow merge commits
- ✅ Allow rebase merging
- ✅ Automatically delete head branches

### Security
- ✅ Dependabot alerts: Enabled
- ✅ Dependabot security updates: Enabled
- ✅ Code scanning: Enabled (CodeQL)
- ✅ Secret scanning: Enabled (Gitleaks)

### Code & Automation
- ✅ Require status checks
- ✅ Require branches to be up to date
- ✅ Require pull request reviews

## Star Graph Optimization

To encourage stars:
- Clear value proposition in README
- Professional badges and formatting
- Active maintenance (regular commits)
- Responsive to issues/PRs
- Good documentation
- Real-world use case examples
